sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88429" key="prorrai/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προρραίνω</orth>, <sense id="n88429.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sprinkle beforehand,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
